plan_type_rationale: Validation/investigation run only. No code changes. Single phase: checkout branch, repopulate, reindex, query, report.

tasks.success_criteria: On branch feature/source-headers-dogfood. git branch confirms.

tasks.description: Repopulate coderef artifacts from the @semantic-stamped source files: npx populate-coderef . Capture exit code. This rebuilds graph.json and index.json with @semantic metadata baked in.
tasks.success_criteria: Exit code 0. .coderef/graph.json updated. No fatal errors.

tasks.description: Rebuild RAG vector index from the enriched graph: npx rag-index (or the CLI equivalent). Capture exit code and vector count.
tasks.success_criteria: Exit code 0. Vector index rebuilt. Count > 0.

tasks.description: Run a discovery query with CODEREF_LLOYD_DISCOVERY_RAG=1 against topic 'output-validator file-grain aggregation'. Use the rag-search CLI or the discovery_rag helper. Capture: number of hits, top hit paths, score range, whether semantic_context is populated.
tasks.success_criteria: Query runs without fatal error. Hits array (even if empty) is returned. semantic_context field presence is verified. Report results.

tasks.description: Return to main branch: git checkout main. Verify no feature branch artifacts leaked to main.
tasks.success_criteria: On main. git status clean (ignoring pre-existing untracked files).
